instructions: Review entries, then set include_on_site to true. Run: python scripts/generate_html.py

vulnerabilities.title: Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM)
vulnerabilities.name: Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM) Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM) contains an improper input validation vulnerability that allows a remotely authenticated user with administrative access to achieve remote code execution.
vulnerabilities.short_description: Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM) contains an improper input validation vulnerability that allows a remotely...
vulnerabilities.fix: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.

vulnerabilities.title: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS
vulnerabilities.name: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS Out-of-bounds Write Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS contains an out-of-bounds write vulnerability in the User-ID Authentication Portal (aka Captive Portal) service that can allow an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code with root privileges on the PA-Series and VM-Series firewalls by sending specially crafted packets.
vulnerabilities.short_description: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS contains an out-of-bounds write vulnerability in the User-ID Authentication Portal (aka...
vulnerabilities.fix: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.    Until the vendor releases an official fix, the following workaround should be implemented:  - Restrict User-ID Authentication Portal access to only trusted zones.  - Disable User-ID Authentication Portal if not required.
